title: Task
description: Task schema from Amazon AppFlow API

sourceFields.description: The source fields to which a particular task is applied.

connectorOperator.description: The operation to be performed on the provided source fields.

destinationField.description: A field in a destination connector, or a field value against which Amazon AppFlow validates a source field.

taskType.description: Specifies the particular task implementation that Amazon AppFlow performs.

taskProperties.description: A map used to store task-related information.
